evals.expected_output: A _posts/YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md file with correct frontmatter (title, date, summary, tags, keywords) and clean markdown body. Tags should include relevant tech tags like cloud-native, ai, etc.
A _posts/YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md file. Title extracted correctly, date from article (or today if not found), body converted to clean markdown without Medium cruft, tags include golang.

evals.prompt: I want to import this article into my blog: https://itnext.io/kubernetes-explained-deep-enough-storage-eb3a71a00e62
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers even though the user didn't use /sync-blog explicitly. Creates _posts/YYYY-MM-DD-kubernetes-explained-deep-enough-storage.md with proper frontmatter and clean content.
